  • Module
  • Tree
  • Deprecated
  • Index
  • Search
  • Help

    Serialized Form

    • Package it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.webLayer.RMI

      • Class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.webLayer.RMI.ClientVirtualView

        class ClientVirtualView extends UnicastRemoteObject implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • bottomBuildings
            List<BuildingDTO> bottomBuildings
            Current bottom building row of the market.
          • bottomCards
            List<CardDTO> bottomCards
            Current bottom card row of the market.
          • connectionError
            boolean connectionError
            Set to true when the server sends an error; checked by the TUI after waking up.
          • currentEra
            ERA currentEra
            The era the game is currently in.
          • currentGamePhase
            GAME_PHASE currentGamePhase
            The phase the game is currently in.
          • defaultTileList
            List<DefaultTileDTO> defaultTileList
            Current list of default tiles on the board.
          • defaultTileOrder
            List<PlayerDTO> defaultTileOrder
            Ordered list of players on the default tile (index = slot position).
          • disconnectedPlayers
            Set<String> disconnectedPlayers
            Set of nicknames of players that have disconnected during the game.
          • drawBot
            int drawBot
            Remaining bottom-row draw count for the current player's offer tile.
          • drawTop
            int drawTop
            Remaining top-row draw count for the current player's offer tile.
          • extraDrawBuildings
            List<BuildingDTO> extraDrawBuildings
            Top building row snapshot sent with the draw-one-more request; shows round-closing buildings.
          • extraDrawCards
            List<CardDTO> extraDrawCards
            Top card row snapshot sent with the draw-one-more request; shows round-closing cards.
          • gameStartLock
            Object gameStartLock
            Lock used to block the TUI until the game transitions from lobby to the first placing phase.
          • guiObservers
            CopyOnWriteArrayList<GUIObserver> guiObservers
            Thread-safe list of registered GUI observers notified on every game-state update.
          • heartbeatActive
            boolean heartbeatActive
            true once the heartbeat scheduler has started; enables pong-timeout counting in ServerListener.
          • isGameStarted
            boolean isGameStarted
            true once the first ClientVirtualView.gamePhaseChanged(GAME_PHASE) with PLACING_PHASE is received.
          • lastErrorMessage
            String lastErrorMessage
            The last error message received from the server, or null if none.
          • leaderboards
            Map<Integer, List<String>> leaderboards
            Global leaderboards received from the server at game end, keyed by player count.
          • needsExtraDraw
            boolean needsExtraDraw
            true when the server has asked this client to pick an extra card (draw-one-more effect).
          • observerExecutor
            ExecutorService observerExecutor
            Single-threaded executor used to dispatch GUI observer callbacks off the RMI thread.
          • offerTileList
            List<OffertileDTO> offerTileList
            Current list of offer tiles on the board.
          • offerTileOccupants
            Map<Integer,String> offerTileOccupants
            Maps offer tile position (0-based) to the nickname of the player currently on it.
          • playersMap
            Map<String, PlayerDTO> playersMap
            Map of all players in the game, keyed by nickname.
          • playerToPlace
            String playerToPlace
            Nickname of the player whose turn it is to place their totem.
          • playerToPlay
            String playerToPlay
            Nickname of the player whose turn it is to resolve actions.
          • pongWatchdog
            PongWatchdog pongWatchdog
            Watchdog that detects server silence and triggers the disconnection handler.
          • recentDisconnections
            Queue<String> recentDisconnections
            Queue of nicknames whose disconnection has not yet been displayed to the user. The TUI drains this queue each iteration and prints a notification.
          • recentReconnections
            Queue<String> recentReconnections
            Queue of nicknames whose reconnection has not yet been displayed to the user. The TUI drains this queue each iteration and prints a notification.
          • resolvedEvents
            List<String> resolvedEvents
            Ordered list of event descriptions resolved so far in the current era.
          • serverDead
            boolean serverDead
            true when the server has been detected as unreachable.
          • stateLock
            Object stateLock
            Internal lock for synchronising concurrent state reads and writes.
          • topBuildings
            List<BuildingDTO> topBuildings
            Current top building row of the market.
          • topCards
            List<CardDTO> topCards
            Current top card row of the market.
          • turnLock
            Object turnLock
            Lock used to pause the TUI between turns; notified on phase change, turn change, or error.
          • winners
            List<PlayerDTO> winners
            Latest list of winning players; set when the game ends.

    • Package it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.DTOs

      • Class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.DTOs.ActionDTO

        class ActionDTO extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

          • drawBot
            int drawBot
            Number of bottom-row draws available to the current player.
          • drawTop
            int drawTop
            Number of top-row draws available to the current player.

      • Class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.DTOs.BoardDTO

        class BoardDTO extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

          • defaultTileList
            List<DefaultTileDTO> defaultTileList
            The list of default tiles on the board.
          • offerTileList
            List<OffertileDTO> offerTileList
            The list of offer tiles on the board.

      • Class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.DTOs.BuildingDTO

        class BuildingDTO extends CardDTO implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        2L

        • Serialized Fields

          • applyOn
            EVENT_TYPE applyOn
            Event type that triggers this building's effect; null if end-game only.
          • buildingID
            int buildingID
            Unique identifier of this building.
          • endGamePP
            int endGamePP
            Prestige points awarded at end of game for owning this building.
          • foodCost
            int foodCost
            Food cost required to purchase this building.

      • Class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.DTOs.CardDTO

        class CardDTO extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

          • builderID
            int builderID
            The builder ID shared by cards with the same effect; set only for builder cards.
          • cardType
            CARD_TYPE cardType
            The type of this card (tribe role, building, or event).
          • era
            ERA era
            The era this card belongs to.
          • eventID
            int eventID
            The unique event identifier; only meaningful for EventCard DTOs.
          • finalPrestigePoint
            int finalPrestigePoint
            End-game prestige points; set only for builder cards.
          • foodDiscount
            int foodDiscount
            Food discount when buying a building; set only for builder cards.
          • hasIcon
            boolean hasIcon
            Whether this hunter card carries an icon granting an immediate food bonus.
          • invIcon
            INV_ICON invIcon
            The invention icon; set only for inventor cards.
          • starNumber
            SHAMAN_STAR starNumber
            The shaman star value; set only for shaman cards.

      • Record Class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.DTOs.DefaultTileDTO

        class DefaultTileDTO extends Record implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

            int foodPerSlotPosition
            The field for the foodPerSlotPosition record component.

      • Class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.DTOs.EventDTO

        class EventDTO extends CardDTO implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

          • eventType
            EVENT_TYPE eventType
            The category of this event (hunt, sustenance, shamanic ritual, or paintings).

      • Class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.DTOs.GameDTO

        class GameDTO extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

          • currentEra
            ERA currentEra
            The era the game is currently in.
          • currentGamePhase
            GAME_PHASE currentGamePhase
            The current phase of the game.
          • playerToPlace
            String playerToPlace
            Nickname of the player who must place their totem next.
          • playerToPlay
            String playerToPlay
            Nickname of the player whose turn it is to draw/play.
          • winners
            List<PlayerDTO> winners
            Ordered list of winning players; null while the game is ongoing.

      • Class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.DTOs.MarketDTO

        class MarketDTO extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

          • bottomBuildings
            List<BuildingDTO> bottomBuildings
            Buildings displayed in the bottom building row of the market.
          • bottomCards
            List<CardDTO> bottomCards
            Cards displayed in the bottom draw row of the market.
          • topBuildings
            List<BuildingDTO> topBuildings
            Buildings displayed in the top building row of the market.
          • topCards
            List<CardDTO> topCards
            Cards displayed in the top draw row of the market.

      • Class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.DTOs.OffertileDTO

        class OffertileDTO extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        2L

        • Serialized Fields

          • drawBot
            int drawBot
            The number of bottom-row draws available on this tile.
          • drawTop
            int drawTop
            The number of top-row draws available on this tile.
          • offerTileID
            char offerTileID
            The single-character identifier of this offer tile (e.g. 'A', 'B', …).

      • Class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.DTOs.PlayerDTO

        class PlayerDTO extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        3L

        • Serialized Fields

          • cardDtoList
            List<CardDTO> cardDtoList
            The list of tribe-member card DTOs in the player's hand.
          • colorTotem
            COLOR colorTotem
            The color of the player's totem.
          • food
            int food
            The player's current food supply.
          • nickName
            String nickName
            The player's unique display name.
          • prestigePoint
            int prestigePoint
            The player's accumulated prestige points.

    • Package it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.RMI

      • Class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.RMI.ServerNetworkHandler

        class ServerNetworkHandler extends UnicastRemoteObject implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • controller
            Controller controller
            The game controller managing game logic once the game has started.
          • isGameStarted
            boolean isGameStarted
            Whether the game has already started (i.e. moved past the lobby phase).
          • playerDTOS
            List<PlayerDTO> playerDTOS
            Snapshot DTOs of all players in the current game, used for lobby notifications.
          • requiredPlayers
            int requiredPlayers
            The number of players required to start the current game.
          • shutdownInitiated
            AtomicBoolean shutdownInitiated
            Guards against multiple concurrent shutdown sequences.
          • viewsByNickname
            ConcurrentHashMap<String, ServerVirtualView> viewsByNickname
            Fast nickname → view lookup used by ping() without holding the global lock.
          • waitingPlayers
            List<ServerVirtualView> waitingPlayers
            List of server-side virtual views for players currently in the lobby.
          • watchdogScheduler
            ScheduledExecutorService watchdogScheduler
            The scheduled executor that periodically checks for missed heartbeats.

    • Package it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.Socket

      • Class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.Socket.messages.playerMessage.PlayerUpdateFoodMessage

        class PlayerUpdateFoodMessage extends Object implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields
